message:
fix(engine): reject empty audience in capability tokens as security violation

- TokenBuilder::build() now returns TokenError::EmptyAudience when
  audience list is empty, preventing creation of tokens that could be
  accepted by any verifier
- verify_token() rejects tokens with empty audience during validation,
  closing a gap where previously-issued empty-audience tokens would pass
- New TokenError::EmptyAudience variant with descriptive error message
- 6 new tests covering: builder rejection, verifier rejection, single
  audience acceptance, multi-audience acceptance, wrong audience
  rejection, and round-trip with populated audience

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
